title: v0.30.5
description: What's Changed Fix gemma4:12b floating point exception crash integrations: hermes windows install by @BruceMacD in #16487 Full Changelog : v0.30.4...v0.30.5

title: v0.30.5-rc0: llama.cpp version update (#16511)
description: Bump llama.cpp to b9509, which includes the upstream Gemma 4 12B multimodal projector fixes for the n_head=0 divide-by-zero crash seen on x86/CUDA/Linux/Windows. Fixes #16479 Fixes #16489 Fixes #16491 Fixes #16492 Fixes #16495

title: v0.30.4
description: What's Changed llama.cpp version update by @dhiltgen in #16463 Kill llama-server during Windows cleanup by @dhiltgen in #16458 Known Issues gemma4:12b crash with floating point exception Full Changelog : v0.30.3...v0.30.4

title: v0.30.4-rc1: llama-server: fix gemma4 patch wiring (#16477)
description: This will fix the "clip.cpp:4399: Unknown projector type" crash.

title: v0.30.4-rc0: Kill llama-server during Windows cleanup (#16458)
description: Windows installer and app cleanup could leave llama-server.exe running when ollama.exe was killed directly, so cleanup now includes llama-server.exe and taskkill /T.

title: v0.30.3
description: What's Changed models: add support for gemma4-12b by @pdevine in #16457 Full Changelog : v0.30.2...v0.30.3

title: v0.30.2
description: What's Changed feat(launch): show and auto-install Cline CLI by @hoyyeva in #16402 log template details to aid troubleshooting by @dhiltgen in #16403 cmd/launch: add Qwen code integration by @hoyyeva in #15900 launch: fix opencode local model limits by @dhiltgen in #16425 llm: include cached prompt tokens in llama-server counts by @dhiltgen in #16428 Harden app markdown URL handling by @dhiltgen in #16380 discover: allow Radeon 8060S iGPU by default by @dhiltgen in #16429 llm: detect llama-serve

title: v0.30.2-rc0: fix laguna patch build breakage (#16445)
description: Follow up to #16396 Fix kernel template instantiation so the symbols are exported in the library.

title: v0.30.1: llm: ignore llama-server SSE ping comments (#16443)
description: llama.cpp b9478 added a default 30s SSE ping that emits colon-only comment frames (":\n\n") while streamed requests are idle; Ollama treated non-data SSE lines as JSON, so skip SSE comments in completion and chat streams.
